results.title: The Best Phone Stands | Tested & Ranked - GearLab
results.snippet: After testing various cell phone stands, we found that angle adjustability is much more important than height adjustment options. If you want a stand that allows for more height and adjustability, see the Lamicall Gooseneck below.
